summary: New Zealand’s dollar advanced to its strongest level in three weeks after a hawkish central bank and strong manufacturing data this week fueled trader bets for two more interest-rate hikes this year.

summary: Carry trades — one of the most widely-used strategies in the $9.5 trillion-per-day currency market — are seeing the most compelling backdrop in more than two decades, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

title: China Embraces Norway's World Cup Star Erling Haaland
title_cn: 中国队拥抱挪威世界杯球星埃尔林·哈兰德

Memes featuring the Norwegian football star have spread across Chinese social media with companies also seeking to capitalize on his fame. Bloomberg China Correspondent Minmin Low explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Extend Gains on Tech Rally, Yen Strengthens: Markets Wrap

summary: Some strategists see a boost to assets, while others were sceptical of a sustained rally, following Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama’s comments Friday encouraging pension funds, including the massive Government Pension Investment Fund, to increase investment in domestic financial assets. Here’s what strategists are saying:

title: Iron Ore Set For Weekly Gain on BHP Port Strike, FMG Stalemate
title_cn: 必和必拓港口罢工、FMG 陷入僵局，铁矿石本周将上涨
summary: Iron ore was on track for the biggest weekly gain since early May as a looming strike at BHP Group’s Port Hedland terminal stoked supply concerns, even as fundamentals remain tested.

title: Can Dogs Save Hong Kong's Dining Scene?
title_cn: 狗能拯救香港餐饮业吗？
summary: Hong Kong’s restaurant industry has been struggling as more residents head to mainland China for their weekend leisure and dining. The government has now introduced a pet-friendly scheme allowing dogs to accompany owners at hundreds of newly-licensed restaurants. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Juliana Liu explains why she thinks more still needs to be done to revive Hong Kong as a destination on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congo Ebola Responders Stay on Strike as Africa CDC Pushes to Resolve Pay Dispute
title_cn: 非洲疾病预防控制中心推动解决薪酬纠纷，刚果埃博拉急救人员继续罢工
summary: Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention is working with the Democratic Republic of Congo to speed overdue payments to striking Ebola responders as the labor dispute threatens efforts to contain the world’s fastest-growing outbreak of the deadly disease.

title: Japan’s Long Bonds, Yen Rise on Push for More GPIF Investment
title_cn: 日本长期债券和日元因推动更多 GPIF 投资而上涨
summary: Japan’s long-term bond yields fell and the yen strengthened after Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said the government wants to encourage pension funds, including the Government Pension Investment Fund, to increase investment in domestic financial assets.

title: Copper Heads for Weekly Gain as Traders Look Past Iran Flare-Up
title_cn: 随着交易商关注伊朗局势的发展，铜价有望每周上涨
summary: Copper was on track for its second straight weekly gain as investors looked past potential demand headwinds presented by the mid-week resurgence in fighting in the Middle East.

title: What’s Driving SK Hynix’ Billion-Dollar ADR Listing
title_cn: 是什么推动了 SK 海力士价值数十亿美元的 ADR 上市
summary: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. Futurum Semiconductors, Supply Chain & Emerging Tech Research Director Brendan Burke shares his insights. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI, Iran War Risks Weigh on Indian IT Firms’ Earnings Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能、伊朗战争风险打压印度 IT 公司的盈利前景
summary: HCL Technologies Ltd., Wipro Ltd. and Tech Mahindra Ltd. are set to report earnings as their investor base increasingly questions the value of traditional IT services in the age of artificial intelligence.

title_cn: 摩根大通、花旗银行家将加入香港联交所上市小组
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Nelly Pai and Citigroup Inc.’s Alexander Schrantz are joining the Hong Kong stock exchange panel responsible for approving initial public offerings, according to people familiar with the matter, as the city sharpens its scrutiny of deal quality.

title: RBI Faces $100 Billion Challenge After Record Currency Defense
title_cn: 印度央行在创纪录的货币防御后面临 1000 亿美元的挑战
summary: Over the past two years, India’s central bank built one of the world’s largest bearish dollar bets to support a persistently weak rupee. It now faces the challenge of unwinding that position without destabilizing the currency market.

title: China AI Star Zhipu’s ‘Low Float’ Risk Persists After Share Sale
title_cn: 中国AI之星智普股份出售后“低流通量”风险依然存在
summary: Zhipu, China’s hottest AI stock, may continue to see wild swings as the company’s $4 billion equities fundraising does little to meaningfully boost its thin pool of publicly tradable shares.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Mideast Tensions and Rate Outlook
title_cn: 交易员权衡中东紧张局势和利率前景，金价持稳
summary: Gold steadied, as investors assessed the fallout from renewed fighting in the Middle East and the prospects for interest-rate hikes to combat inflation.

title: JPMorgan Builds AI Agents That Beat 60/40 Portfolio in Backtests
title_cn: 摩根大通构建的人工智能代理在回测中击败了 60/40 的投资组合
summary: As investors increasingly turn to artificial intelligence for help with everything from stock picking to risk management, JPMorgan Chase & Co. has been testing whether a model can do something more ambitious: allocate money itself.

title: Tanger CEO: ‘Incredible Traffic’ Tied to World Cup
title_cn: Tanger首​​席执行官：与世界杯相关的“令人难以置信的交通”
summary: Stephen Yalof, President and CEO of Tanger Inc., appeared on the program to discuss the company's recent performance. Tanger is experiencing near-record results driven by strong summer traffic, contributing to a significant year-to-date stock increase of 18.28%. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Makes Biggest Foreign Debut in US
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国进行最大规模的海外首秀
summary: SK Hynix raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary receipt offering, the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. The South Korean memory chipmaker’s US offering gives the company a powerful fundraising channel, tapping investors looking for more ways to play the red-hot artificial intelligence infrastructure trade. Bloomberg's Denny Thomas reports from Seoul. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Technoprobe’s 330% Surge Makes It a European AI Stock Standout
title_cn: Technoprobe 飙升 330% 使其成为欧洲人工智能股中的佼佼者
summary: An Italian firm whose products are key to the chips being made by Nvidia Corp. has emerged as one of Europe’s biggest winners in the artificial intelligence boom.

title: China Omits Job Goal in Five-Year Plan for First Time in Decades
title_cn: 中国几十年来首次在五年计划中省略就业目标
summary: China set no numeric target for urban job creation for the first time in at least three decades, in an apparent nod to rising uncertainty over employment as AI spreads through the economy.

title: TCS Quarterly Net Income Climbs as Deals Cushion IT Slump
title_cn: TCS 季度净利润攀升，交易缓解 IT 低迷
summary: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. reported a nearly 5% rise in quarterly profit with a string of cost-cutting efforts and deals helping Asia’s largest outsourcer weather a slump in the sector.

title: Neolix on Business & Growth Outlook
title_cn: Neolix 的业务和增长前景
summary: Will Zhao, Executive President of China‑based autonomous delivery firm Neolix, outlines the company’s growth and expansion strategy in key markets such as the Middle East. He says Neolix’s business model is embedded in global shipping workflows, calling it the future of “physical AI” as economies confront labor shortages, aging populations, and rising wages, meeting what he describes as universal demand. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Futurum's Burke on SK Hynix ADR Listing
title_cn: Futurum 的 Burke 于 SK 海力士 ADR 上市
summary: Brendan Burke, Research Director for Semiconductors, Supply Chain and Emerging Technology at Futurum, discusses his outlook for memory-chip maker SK Hynix's as the company is set to deliver the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade".Brendan Burke, Research Director for Semiconductors, Supply Chain and Emerging Technology at Futurum, discusses his outlook for memory-chip maker SK Hynix's as the company is set to deliver the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adani Flagship Is the Next Big India Pick for Singapore’s Helios
title_cn: 阿达尼旗舰店是新加坡 Helios 的下一个印度大选择
summary: Helios Capital Management is betting on the flagship stock of India’s Adani Group to be the next big winner for its funds in a market left behind in the global AI frenzy.

title: Tencent in Talks to Become Manus’ Largest Holder, FT Reports
title_cn: 据《金融时报》报道，腾讯正在洽谈成为 Manus 的最大股东
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is in discussions to become the largest shareholder in Manus, the Chinese agentic AI pioneer whose blockbuster acquisition by Meta Platforms Inc. was struck down by Beijing, the Financial Times reported.

title: Malaysia’s Anwar to Debut an AI Double That Sounds Just Like Him
title_cn: 马来西亚安瓦尔将首次推出听起来像他的人工智能替身
summary: Malaysia Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim is about to do something very few heads of government have done: send an artificial intelligence version of himself out to meet the public.

title: China Chip Firm Nexchip Rises in HK After $891 Million Listing
title_cn: 中国芯片公司 Nexchip 上市 8.91 亿美元后在香港崛起
summary: Nexchip Semiconductor Corp. jumped as much as 14% Friday after raising $891 million in a share sale, showing the appetite for Chinese chipmakers after a deluge of offerings in the artificial intelligence industry.

title: Emerging: AI Sovereignty Isn't "Self-Sufficiency"
title_cn: 新兴：人工智能主权不是“自给自足”
summary:
Could AI become the next geopolitical battleground? Bloomberg's Menaka Doshi asks Fractal Analytics Co-founder Srikanth Velamakanni why countries are rethinking AI sovereignty and why smart interdependence may matter more than self-sufficiency.

Bloomberg launches Emerging, a monthly podcast series hosted by Menaka Doshi and Haslinda Amin on the rising economies shaping the global future. In episode one, Menaka looks at India’s AI challenge: how the world’s most populous country can compete in a race dominated by the US and China. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Executive Fidji Simo to Step Down After Medical Leave
title_cn: OpenAI 高管 Fidji Simo 病假后辞职
summary: OpenAI’s Fidji Simo, who oversaw much of the AI startup’s core business, is stepping down from her full-time role following a three-month medical leave and will hand her responsibilities to three other top executives.

title: Crypto Criminal Accused of Crypto Crimes Again, While in Jail
title_cn: 加密货币罪犯在监狱中再次被指控犯有加密货币犯罪
summary: A convicted crypto criminal is in trouble for crypto criming again. While in jail.

title: Stocks Get Boost From Chipmakers | The Close 7/9/2026
title_cn: 芯片制造商提振股市收盘价 7/9/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Robinhood Markets CIO Stephanie Guild, Telsey Advisory Group CEO & Chief Research Officer Dana Telsey, Goldman Sachs Senior Consumer Analyst, Managing Director Bonnie Herzog, Alger Executive Vice President, Portfolio Manager Ankur Crawford, Schwab Center for Financial Research Head of Macro Research & Strategy Kevin Gordon, Class V Group Founder Lise Buyer, Willow Wealth CEO Mitch Caplan, Tanger President & CEO Stephen Yalof, & Deutsche Bank Research Analyst Michael Linenberg. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alger’s Crawford: ‘Everything Is Moving So Fast’ With AI
title_cn: Alger 的 Crawford：人工智能“一切都进展得如此之快”
summary: Ankur Crawford, Executive Vice President and Portfolio Manager at Alder, discusses the implications of Meta's AI strategy and its potential impact on the tech and cloud computing sectors. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gates Heir’s Shopping App Took Credit for Sales It Didn’t Drive
title_cn: 盖茨继承人的购物应用程序将其未推动的销售归功于自己
summary: Phia, an advertising startup co-founded by Phoebe Gates, daughter of billionaire Microsoft Corp. co-founder Bill Gates, bills itself as a “personal shopping assistant” that helps users find the lowest prices on a broad range of clothes and fashion accessories.

title: Robinhood CIO Discusses Market Trends as Magnificent 7 Underperform
title_cn: Robinhood 首席信息官讨论 Magnificent 7 表现不佳的市场趋势
summary: Stephanie Guild, Chief Investment Officer at Robinhood, joins the program to discuss current market dynamics ahead of the trading day close. The conversation highlights the underperformance of the Bloomberg Magnificent 7 stocks, which have returned only 1.1% normalized as of December 31, 2022, compared to a 13.8% return for the rest of the S&P 500 excluding these seven stocks. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Secretive China Chipmaker Is Built to Dodge US Curbs
title_cn: 神秘的中国芯片制造商旨在躲避美国的限制
summary: Founded by a US-trained entrepreneur, CXMT is racing to catch its rivals and using a largely domestic supplier network to shield itself from Washington.

title: Why Young Investors Are Taking So Much Risk
title_cn: 为什么年轻投资者要冒如此大的风险
summary: With homeownership out of reach, AI cutting job prospects and index funds feeling too slow, many young investors are turning to meme stocks, options and crypto in the hope of securing their future. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lutnick Presses SK Hynix, Samsung to Boost Memory Output in US
title_cn: Lutnick 敦促 SK 海力士和三星提高美国内存产量
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick called on Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc. to step up their efforts to expand memory chip production in the US to help address a global shortage in components critical to the development of artificial intelligence.

title: Wayve Staff Sold Stock at 10% Discount on Pisces Exchange
title_cn: Wayve 员工在双鱼座交易所以 10% 折扣出售股票
summary: Wayve Technologies Ltd. employees sold shares on London’s new private market at a 10% discount to the self-driving technology startup’s previous valuation, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Tech Drives US Stocks Higher as Traders Downplay Iran War Risks
title_cn: 交易员淡化伊朗战争风险，科技股推动美国股市走高
summary: US stocks rose as investors put aside concerns over the latest flare-up between the US and Iran to pile on technology stocks after recent declines spurred dip buying.

title: Real Yield 7/9/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Societe Generale Americas Head of Research Subadra Rajappa, Longtail Alpha Founder Vineer Bhansali, CreditSights Head of US IG & Macro Strategy Zachary Griffiths, and Octagon Credit Investors CEO Gretchen Lam. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI, Anthropic Hit New Speed Bump With US Government
title_cn: OpenAI、Anthropic 与美国政府达成新的进展
summary: The Trump administration is taking a more active role in reviewing AI models.

title: Former Fed Chairman Bernanke Joins Anthropic Oversight Trust
title_cn: 前美联储主席伯南克加入人类监督信托基金
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chairman Ben Bernanke has been appointed to Anthropic’s long-term benefit trust, an oversight body meant to keep the artificial intelligence company accountable to its public mission. Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: See Amazon Concessions As Buying Opportunity: Griffiths
title_cn: 将亚马逊优惠视为购买机会：Griffiths
summary: Zachary Griffiths, head of US IG & macro strategy at CreditSights, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Amazon borrowed $25 billion in an eight-part offering that garnered about $62 billion in peak investor demand, about half the orders it attracted for its prior $37 billion deal in March. The offering is heaping pressure on the broader tech space, with the sector among the worst performers in the US high-grade secondary market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: History Shows Burnham Should Be ‘Bold’
title_cn: 历史表明伯纳姆应该“大胆”
summary: Andy Burnham appears set to be the new UK prime minister. Political commentator Steve Richards looks at his record and how he might deal with the popularity of the Reform party’s Nigel Farage. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Fires Democrats on Election Commission, Republican Resigns
title_cn: 特朗普解雇选举委员会民主党人，共和党人辞职
summary: President Donald Trump fired two Democratic members of the US Election Assistance Commission, an agency charged with helping states facilitate accurate elections, and the Republican member resigned, a White House official said Thursday night.

title: Modi Visit Showcases New Zealand Leader Luxon’s Trade Coup Ahead of Tight Ballot
title_cn: 莫迪访问展示了新西兰领导人 Luxon 在紧张投票前的贸易政变
summary: Narendra Modi’s visit to Auckland — the first by an Indian prime minister in four decades — highlights one of New Zealand leader Christopher Luxon’s biggest foreign policy coups: securing a free trade agreement with the world’s most populous nation.

title: Asean to Meet With Myanmar Minister for First Time Since 2021
title_cn: 东盟自2021年以来首次会见缅甸部长
summary: Foreign ministers from the Association of Southeast Asian Nations will meet with their Myanmar counterpart for the first time in five years, according to the Philippines.

title: Xi Voices Worry on Work Safety After Shoe Factory Fire Kills 28
title_cn: 鞋厂火灾造成28人死亡后，习近平对安全生产表示担忧
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping voiced worries about repeated deadly workplace accidents after a blaze at a shoe factory killed 28 people.

title: China Taps Ex-Officials to Discern Trump’s Aims, US Elections
title_cn: 中国利用前官员来辨别特朗普的目标和美国大选
summary: A pair of former Chinese diplomats visited the US last month to better understand the Trump administration’s stance on a fragile trade truce, according to people familiar with the matter, as China seeks to gauge how upcoming US elections might affect ties.

title: US Says Iran Technical Talks to Continue Despite Recent Strikes
title_cn: 美国表示，尽管最近发生了袭击，伊朗技术谈判仍将继续
summary: Technical talks between the US and Iran are continuing, according to a US official, following two days of clashes that threatened to shatter an already fragile ceasefire between the two nations.

title: Johor Election Tests Ties Within Anwar’s Ruling Alliance
title_cn: 柔佛选举考验安华执政联盟内部关系
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s ruling coalition looks set to face renewed pressure in this weekend’s Johor state election, with concerns a low voter turnout may hurt its performance.

title: Kim Jong Un Calls for ‘Radical’ Boost to Spy Agency’s Intel Ops
title_cn: 金正恩呼吁“彻底”加强间谍机构的英特尔行动
summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un ordered the spy agency to strengthen its intelligence activities “in a radical way” as he convened a meeting of top military officials, state media reported.

title: Fate of Iran Ceasefire Uncertain After Escalation | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/09/2026
title_cn: 伊朗停火升级后命运不确定权力平衡：最新版 07/09/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Wendy Sherman, former Deputy Secretary of State in the Biden administration and lead US negotiator for the 2015 Iran nuclear deal, says diplomacy with Iran is "quite challenged" and argues recent negotiations were "never serious or as complex as they needed to be." Matt Robison, a former Democratic campaign manager and legislative director who has worked with members of Maine's congressional delegation, says Democrats are getting a chance to reset Maine's Senate race after Graham Platner suspended his campaign following a sexual assault allegation he denies. Mike Sommers, President and CEO of the American Petroleum Institute, says oil markets have held up better than many feared during the latest US-Iran escalation. But Sommers warns prices will remain elevated as long as traffic through the Strait of Hormuz is restricted. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can US Housing Relief Bill Survive Trump’s Power Play?
title_cn: 美国住房救济法案能否在特朗普的权力游戏中幸存？
summary: By the weekend, the US could have a sweeping new housing law championed by lawmakers on both sides of the aisle — unless the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act’s passage into law is thrown further into doubt by a presidential veto. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Katy O’Donnell and Megan Scully join Sarah Holder to talk through what’s in the housing bill and what Trump’s interventions could mean for Republicans in the midterms. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Iran Truce in Limbo After Renewed Strikes, Sanctions
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗停战协议在新一轮打击和制裁后陷入困境
summary: A two-day exchange of airstrikes and the reimposition of US oil sanctions have left the truce President Donald Trump reached with Iran last month in limbo.

title: API's Sommers Urges Full Reopening Of Hormuz
title_cn: API 的索默斯敦促霍尔木兹全面重新开放
summary: Mike Sommers, President and CEO of the American Petroleum Institute, says oil markets have held up better than many feared during the latest US-Iran escalation. But Sommers warns prices will remain elevated as long as traffic through the Strait of Hormuz is restricted, emphasizing that fully reopening the strait is "the most important thing" to do in the immediate term. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategist: Democrats Can 'Start Fresh' In Maine
title_cn: 策略师：民主党可以在缅因州“重新开始”
summary: Matt Robison, a former Democratic campaign manager and legislative director who has worked with members of Maine's congressional delegation, says Democrats are getting a chance to reset Maine's Senate race after Graham Platner suspended his campaign following a sexual assault allegation he denies. Robison warns national Democrats face a delicate process in choosing a replacement because they cannot be seen "putting a thumb on the scale." He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sherman: Iran Talks Were 'Never Serious' Enough
title_cn: 谢尔曼：伊朗谈判“从来都不够认真”
summary: Wendy Sherman, former Deputy Secretary of State in the Biden administration and lead US negotiator for the 2015 Iran nuclear deal, says diplomacy with Iran is "quite challenged" and argues recent negotiations were "never serious or as complex as they needed to be." Sherman says the US has done harm to Iran's regime, but warns military action alone will not stop Tehran from pursuing a nuclear weapon, saying "you can't bomb knowledge." She also calls Ukraine's Patriot missile production license "very positive news," while arguing Washington has not put enough pressure on Vladimir Putin to bring him to the negotiating table. She speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump's Latest Power Play Threatens US Housing Relief Bill
title_cn: 特朗普最新的权力游戏威胁美国住房救济法案
summary: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act could come into force this weekend barring another round of disruption from the president.

title: Trump Trade Adviser Navarro Presses Contempt Fight DOJ Dropped
title_cn: 特朗普贸易顾问纳瓦罗敦促司法部撤销藐视法庭诉讼
summary: Peter Navarro, a senior trade adviser to President Donald Trump, is taking the unusual step of continuing to challenge his contempt of Congress conviction under the Biden administration even though the Justice Department walked away from the case nearly a year ago.

title: Here’s Who Could Replace Graham Platner on the Maine Ballot
title_cn: 谁可以取代缅因州选票上的格雷厄姆·普拉特纳
summary: Maine Democrat Graham Platner’s withdrawal from the race for a US Senate seat unleashed a scramble by a handful of candidates who have little time to build support ahead of a convention the party is planning before a July 27 deadline to confirm a name on the ballot.

title: Platner Exit Leaves Maine Democrats With No Obvious Frontrunner
title_cn: 普拉特纳退出使缅因州民主党没有明显的领跑者
summary: Graham Platner’s political demise has set off an unprecedented scramble to find a replacement to take on Republican incumbent Senator Susan Collins, with at least six Democrats entering the wide-open field and less than four months until the November midterms.

title: US Declines to Immediately Put Tariffs on Aircraft, Jet Parts
title_cn: 美国拒绝立即对飞机、喷气式飞机零部件征收关税
summary: The US will not immediately impose tariffs on commercial aircraft, jet engines and parts following an investigation, with President Donald Trump instead directing the administration to negotiate with trading partners to adjust imports of those products.

title: Chipmakers Boost Stocks, Meta Explores Cloud Business | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/9/2026
title_cn: 芯片制造商提振股价，Meta 探索云业务 |彭博商业周刊日报 7/9/2026
summary: Today, Edward Fishman, director of the Maurice R. Greenberg Center for Geoeconomics at the Council on Foreign Relations, discusses renewed conflict between Iran and the US and what it means for the global oil trade as the two countries trade strikes. Then, Aaron Mulvihill, global alternatives strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, breaks down the economic impact of renewed conflict and the market reaction to the AI trade. Plus, Bloomberg technology reporter Maggie Eastland discusses Micron's move to increase investment in the US to build out memory capability. Then, Bloomberg senior technology reporter Kurt Wagner talks his interview with Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg and his company's move to charge for a tier of its AI model. Finally, Bloomberg senior national political correspondent Nancy Cook discusses the Democratic party's next move as Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner drops out of the race after allegations of sexual assault. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saudis Eye Canada as PIF Accepts Carney Invite to Toronto
title_cn: PIF 接受卡尼邀请前往多伦多，沙特关注加拿大
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said Saudi Arabian investors are interested in Canadian energy, mining and infrastructure, as he concluded the first visit of a Canadian leader to the Middle Eastern kingdom in 26 years.

title: Mitch McConnell’s Absence Reignites Debate Over Aging Politicians
title_cn: 米奇·麦康奈尔的缺席再次引发有关老龄化政客的争论
summary: Assurances that the senator is working from the hospital won’t quiet scrutiny of aging lawmakers.

title: Khamenei’s Funeral Concluded Amid Renewed US, Iran Fighting
title_cn: 哈梅内伊葬礼在美国与伊朗重燃战火中结束
summary: Iran concluded the funeral of its slain Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, more than four months after he was assassinated in US-Israeli airstrikes and amid renewed fighting with the US.

title: Burnham Set to Become Next UK Premier With Majority of MP Votes
title_cn: 伯纳姆将以多数议员选票成为下一任英国首相
summary: Andy Burnham’s path to becoming the next UK prime minister looks certain after a vast majority of Labour MPs formally nominated him to be the next party leader.

title: Reeves’ Fiscal Rules Don’t Stop UK Debt Rising, Tories Warn
title_cn: 保守党警告说，里夫斯的财政规则并不能阻止英国债务上升
summary: Labour’s fiscal rules don’t work because they allow the national debt to ratchet ever higher, the main opposition Conservative Party’s Treasury spokesman, Mel Stride, said.

title: Lagarde Says She’s Not a Candidate for French Election: Euronews
title_cn: 拉加德表示她不是法国大选的候选人：欧洲新闻
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said she’ll try to have her voice heard during next year’s French presidential election, while declining that she’s pondering a campaign herself.

title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes | Balance of Power 7/9/2026
title_cn: 美国、伊朗贸易空袭|权力平衡 7/9/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu discusses the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Vice President of the Defense & Security Department at the Center for Strategic and International Studies Emily Harding. (Source: Bloomberg)
